faq.title: FAQ - AI Music Generator
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Marble AI's Music Generator.

items.title: What is AI Music Generation?
items.description: AI Music Generation is an AI-powered technology that creates music from text prompts. Simply provide your description, and Marble AI's advanced models will generate stunning music for you.

items.question: Which AI models does Marble AI support?
items.answer: Marble AI integrates the leading music generation models including Suno and Udio. Each model has unique strengths, and you can choose the best one for your specific needs.

items.question: How do I use Marble AI's Music Generator?
items.answer: Simply enter a text description of the music you want, customize the style and lyrics if desired, select your preferred AI model, and click generate. Our intuitive interface makes it easy for anyone to create professional-quality music in minutes.

items.question: What music quality can I expect?
items.answer: Marble AI generates studio-quality music with professional-grade audio. The exact output depends on the model you choose, but all our models are optimized for exceptional sound quality, natural vocals, and rich instrumentation.

items.question: Can I use generated music commercially?
items.answer: Yes! All music generated through Marble AI comes with full commercial rights. You can use them for marketing, products, websites, social media, and any other business purposes without restrictions.

items.question: How fast is the music generation?
items.answer: Most music is generated within 2-3 minutes depending on the model and complexity. Our optimized infrastructure ensures you get your results quickly without compromising quality.

items.question: Can I customize the lyrics of generated music?
items.answer: Absolutely! Marble AI offers extensive customization options including custom lyrics, style presets, and genre selection. You have full control over the creative direction of your music.

items.question: What genres of music can I create?
items.answer: Marble AI supports a wide range of genres including pop, rock, classical, electronic, jazz, country, folk, and more. You can specify the genre in your prompt or let the AI choose the best style for your description.
